data.description: KEPPEL INFRASTRUCTURE TRUST: DANIEL CUTHBERT EE HOCK HUAT TO RETIRE AS CHAIRMAN; KHOR POH HWA APPOINTED AS NEW BOARD CHAIRMAN

data.title: Anthropic Expands Use of Google Cloud and TPUs
data.description: A recent update reveals that Anthropic is set to receive a significant boost in TPU capacity, acquiring multiple gigawatts. The company, based in SUNNYVALE, California, made this announcement on April 6, 2026. This expansion is a part of Anthropic's strategy to enhance its development of foundation models, agents, and enterprise solutions through the utilization of TPU chips and cloud services.

data.title: Broadcom Stock Climbs On New Deals With Google, Anthropic
data.description: Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ: AVGO) saw an increase in shares during Monday's after-hours trading following announcements of new deals with Alphabet, Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) and Anthropic. AVGO stock is on the rise as a result. In an SEC filing, Broadcom shared details of an extended partnership with Google to support their upcoming AI infrastructure. This long-term agreement will involve Broadcom providing TPUs to Google and Anthropic. For more information, check out the complete article on the Benzinga website.

data.title: NorthWestern Energy to Host First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Webinar
data.description: A company known as NorthWestern Energy (Nasdaq: NWE) revealed plans to hold an investor webinar on April 30, 2026, at 3:30 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss its financial performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The company, based in Butte, Montana, and Sioux Falls, South Dakota, will release a news report on its financial results on the evening of April 29, 2026. To participate in the webinar, interested individuals can register by visiting the following link: https://northwesternenergy.com/earning.

data.title: Entergy announces quarterly dividend payment to shareholders
data.description: The board of directors at Entergy announced today a quarterly dividend payment of $0.64 per share on their common stock. Shareholders as of May 1, 2026, will receive the dividend on June 1, 2026. Entergy has consistently provided cash dividends to its shareholders.

data.title: Casey's General Stores Set to Join S&P 500; DigitalOcean Holdings to Join S&P MidCap 400; Broadstone Net Lease to Join S&P SmallCap 600
data.description: On April 6, 2026, it was announced that Casey's General Stores Inc. (NASDAQ: CASY) will be replacing Hologic Inc. (NASDAQ: HOLX) in the S&P 500 index. This decision will lead to DigitalOcean Holdings Inc. (NYSE: DOCN) taking Casey's spot in the S&P MidCap 400. This change reflects movements in the market and the reshuffling of companies based on their market capitalization and performance. These moves are significant as they involve prominent companies and indices that are closely monitored by investors and analysts.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase's CEO predicts AI will revolutionize every aspect of the company, with adoption accelerating quickly.
data.description: According to Jamie Dimon, the CEO of JPMorgan Chase, the rate of adoption of artificial intelligence is expected to be significantly faster than previous technological transformations. Dimon's statement hints at a swift adoption pace for AI technology across industries, with potential implications for various sectors.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Stocks Rise Amid Trump's Latest Iran War Comments; Nvidia, Seagate, Tesla Are Key Movers
data.description: Stock market futures for the Dow Jones showed an increase after President Trump made comments regarding the situation in Iran. On Monday, the stock market closed on a positive note, with notable movements in key stocks such as Tesla, Nvidia, and Seagate. Tesla stock experienced a decline amidst these developments. This update indicates the market's response to Trump's statements and the impact on specific companies like Tesla.

data.title: Oil Prices Rise On Brink Of Escalation Over Strait Of Hormuz
data.description: Extended closure of the Strait of Hormuz could result in a significant increase in oil prices. Recent reports show oil prices have surged due to escalating tensions in the region, with the possibility of reaching unprecedented levels. This development has raised concerns among investors and analysts about the potential economic impact of such a situation.

data.title: Landlord Insurance Ontario: What New Market Data Means for Your 2026 ROI
data.description: In Toronto as of April 6, 2026, residential construction launches in Canada have seen a significant shift towards purpose-built rental properties. This change comes as the ownership market faces challenges due to stringent financial circumstances. This transition is reshaping the risk dynamics within the property sector, with purpose-built rentals taking the lead in new construction projects.

data.title: UnitedHealth, Humana, Health Insurers Jump On Higher Medicare Advantage Payments
data.description: In 2027, Medicare Advantage payments are set to increase by 2.5%, surpassing initial projections. This development is particularly beneficial for health insurers like UnitedHealth and Humana. The augmented payments have spurred a positive market reaction, with these companies experiencing notable stock jumps.

data.title: MAIB Selects FINEOS to Deliver Next-Generation Claims Management System
data.description: In Sydney today, FINEOS Corporation (ASX: FCL) revealed that the Motor Accidents Insurance Board (MAIB) of Tasmania has opted for the FINEOS Platform to modernize its Motor Accidents Claims System (MACS). The MAIB, a Tasmanian Government Business Enterprise, offers mandatory third-party personal injury insurance. This selection signifies a move towards a more modern, secure, and customer-focused claims management solution. The FINEOS Platform will replace the existing system, enhancing efficiency and service delivery.

data.title: Author Challenges Extremes in Christian Views on Sex and Intimacy
data.description: A recent book has been published in Edgewood, Ky on April 6, 2026, providing a unique outlook on intimacy, faith, and relational development for married couples. Authored by Roy M. Myers, Ph.D., DMin, the book incorporates biblical principles, pastoral insights, and interviews with couples. This marks Myers' debut book and aims to offer valuable perspectives on these important aspects of marriage.

data.title: Altai Announces Transfer of Listing to NEX
data.description: Altai Resources Inc. (NEX: ATI.H) has been transferred from the TSX Venture Exchange to the NEX board, effective today. The 90-day Notice to Transfer to NEX has been withdrawn by the TSXV, following Altai's announcement on February 17, 2026. The Company's trading symbol has changed to ATI.H, while its name, CUSIP number, and capital consolidation remain unchanged. Altai is actively seeking new mining exploration properties as part of its ongoing pursuit of strategic alternatives.

data.title: TMC Financing Promotes Ron Lien and Kisha Gant to Executive Leadership Roles
data.description: Executive promotions at TMC Financing in Oakland, California on April 6, 2026, saw Ron Lien elevated to Chief Credit Officer and Kisha Gant to Chief Operating Officer. These appointments signify a strategic move to enhance disciplined execution and leadership within the organization. This development comes as TMC Financing achieved a historic milestone in the Small Business Administration (SBA) 504 program. The company is continuing to strengthen its position in the industry, with a focus on effective management and operational excellence.(Word count: 86)

data.title: Polymarket to adopt USDC-backed token, drops USDC.e. Upgrades to include new contracts; bridged stablecoin phased out.
data.description: In the upcoming weeks, Polymarket plans to enhance its exchange infrastructure by launching fresh contracts and a USDC-supported token, while discontinuing a bridged stablecoin.
